content:
🚀 kittyfarm | Swift
🎯 Primary Use Case: Running and managing multiple iOS Simulators and Android Emulators concurrently on a Mac for efficient mobile app testing and development.
✨ Key Features: • Live display of iOS Simulators and Android Emulators in a single window • Synchronized touch input across multiple devices • Device bezels rendered from official assets • Build & Play functionality for parallel deployment • Drag-and-drop device reordering
📖 Summary: KittyFarm is a macOS application designed to streamline mobile development workflows by allowing developers to run and control multiple iOS Simulators and Android Emulators simultaneously within a single window. It offers features like synchronized touch input, parallel deployment, and proportional device scaling.
🔗 Links: • View Project ================ 🔓 Open Source
